Package gov.cdc.izgateway.db

package gov.cdc.izgateway.db
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    gov.cdc.izgateway
     
    gov.cdc.izgateway.ads
     
    gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb
    The dynamodb package contains packages and classes supporting integration of IZ Gateway Hub with DynamoDB as it's back end database.
    gov.cdc.izgateway.elastic
     
    gov.cdc.izgateway.hub
    This package houses the SOAP Controllers used by IZ Gateway for sending and receiving SOAP Messages.
    gov.cdc.izgateway.status
     
  • Class
    Description
    DbController
    This class provides APIs to manage information in the database.
    DbController.DbControllerConfiguration
    Configuration for the DB Controller.
    RefreshQueueService
    A service to send refresh messages to other instances via SQS and await their responses.
    RefreshQueueService.RefreshRequest
    A refresh request message to be sent via SQS.
    RefreshQueueService.RefreshResponse
    A refresh response message to be sent via SQS.
